<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Guanfacine Hydrochloride 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Paxneury is indicated&nbsp;for the&nbsp;treatment of&nbsp;attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD) in children&nbsp;and adolescents&nbsp;6‑17&nbsp;years old for&nbsp;whom stimulants are not...</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L2</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>attention deficit hyperactivity disorder, inattentive type（100.0%）</li>
<li>attention deficit-hyperactivity disorder（100.0%）</li>
<li>faciodigitogenital syndrome（100.0%）</li>
<li>specific developmental disorder（100.0%）</li>
<li>chondromyxoid fibroma（99.9%）</li>
<li>trichotillomania（99.8%）</li>
<li>manic bipolar affective disorder（99.7%）</li>
<li>restless legs syndrome（99.6%）</li>
<li>Tourette syndrome（99.3%）</li>
<li>postural orthostatic tachycardia syndrome（99.1%）</li>
<li>multiple system atrophy（98.2%）</li>
<li>variably protease-sensitive prionopathy（97.7%）</li>
<li>migraine disorder（97.2%）</li>
<li>migraine with brainstem aura（96.9%）</li>
<li>hypotrichosis simplex of the scalp（96.8%）</li>
<li>congenital hypotrichosis milia（96.5%）</li>
<li>major affective disorder（96.1%）</li>
<li>diffuse alopecia areata（95.5%）</li>
<li>primary hereditary glaucoma（95.2%）</li>
<li>cerebellar ataxia（94.7%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
